{| class="wikitable"
| Outer
|-
|
{| class="wikitable"
| Nested || Value
|}
|}

{{Box
| content =
{| class="wikitable"
! Inside !! Template
|}
}}

  {| class="wikitable"
| Indented || Table
|}

{| class="wikitable"
| First line
continuation line
|-
| Next
| Cell
|}

<!-- wikitext-fmt-ignore-start -->
{| class="wikitable"
! Ignored !! Table
|}
<!-- wikitext-fmt-ignore-end -->
